summary: Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of professional experience designing and building user-focused web applications. Skilled in frontend architecture, UI design, and accessibility, with a track record of leading projects from concept to production.

positions.title: Lead Engineer
bullets: Led frontend architecture for multiple production applications, codifying shared frontend patterns and a component library in Storybook that improved consistency and reduced redundant UI work as systems scaled.

Designed and delivered a stepper-driven data portal to replace a manual Excel and email process, streamlining a previously error-prone workflow and strengthening the proposal against competing bids on a high-value contract.
Worked with stakeholders and designers early in the process, using Figma-based workflows and lightweight prototypes to shape interaction and layout decisions before writing large amounts of code.

Scoped and shipped a secure LLM-powered chatbot from prototype to production, building the frontend interfaces and internal tooling, and establishing AI-assisted workflows that accounted for model behavior under compliance constraints.

positions.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Led an Angular-to-React migration with a focus on improving UI structure, component reuse, and long-term maintainability while preserving familiar user workflows.
Led Section 508 compliance efforts across production applications, establishing shared accessibility standards and patterns that made interfaces usable by default across the team.

Introduced shared frontend standards and tooling - Prettier, ESLint, Husky - and led a shift from class-based to functional components, adopting TanStack Query for consistent, predictable server state management across the UI.
Authored onboarding guides and accessibility documentation, helping new developers understand system patterns and build interfaces that are usable by default.

experience.title: Founder
bullets: Founded a small web studio delivering design-focused products for small businesses and nonprofits, with an emphasis on clarity, accessibility, and long-term maintainability.
Designed and built a multi-state employee portal and scheduling platform still in active use, focusing on clear interaction patterns and reducing friction in day-to-day tasks.
Led UX strategy, prototyping, and frontend development across projects, established reusable UI patterns and documentation that reduced inconsistency and improved development speed across projects

experience.title: UI Developer
bullets: Contributed to early-stage product direction by creating wireframes and interaction flows that clarified requirements and aligned design and engineering.
Documented layout decisions, accessibility considerations, and interaction patterns to establish a shared reference point for implementation.

experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Built a custom scroll-driven timeline experience using Vue, GSAP, and CSS, translating a motion-heavy design into a smooth, performant interface.
Developed reusable Vue components for geospatial workflows, with accessibility and clarity built into component behavior and structure.
Documented UI patterns and interaction details to support consistency as the product evolved.

awards.title: Platinum Award (Booz Allen Hamilton)
awards.details: Designed and built a registration and scheduling platform for a multi-day convention, creating a clear and reliable experience for session selection and on-site coordination.

awards.title: Gold Award (Booz Allen Hamilton)
awards.details: Designed and prototyped product concepts directly with clients, helping establish a clear direction and shared understanding before development.

awards.title: Gold Award (Booz Allen Hamilton)
awards.details: Led the redesign of a widely used internal application, improving usability and visual clarity and making the interface easier to navigate and understand.

projects.title: No Whiteboard Jobs Dashboard - Side Project
projects.description: Designed and built a data-focused dashboard for exploring the Hiring Without Whiteboards dataset, with search, filtering, pagination, and responsive layouts that support real user workflows. Focused on clarity, usability, and consistent interaction patterns. Built with Astro, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, using AI-assisted workflows to support rapid iteration while maintaining code quality.

projects.title: Pretty Pretty Pretty Good - Freelance Studio
projects.description: A mission-driven freelance studio focused on custom websites for nonprofits, community organizations, artists, and values-aligned people. The model is access-first: free when funding is not available, and sliding-scale when clients can contribute. Built with Astro and deployed on Vercel, with Upstash Redis for lightweight serverless data features.

projects.title: JS13K — Electron Orbital Puzzle
projects.description: A physics-based puzzle game where players guide electrons into atomic orbitals using electromagnetic attraction and repulsion, inspired by the Aufbau principle. Built around emergent behavior — balancing charge interactions, timing, and spatial positioning to reach stable configurations. Built with vanilla JavaScript and Canvas 2D under JS13k constraints, with a focus on tight mechanics and readable visual feedback.

Combined: TypeScript 5 • JavaScript • React 19 • Next.js • Astro • Vue • Tailwind CSS 4 • Framer Motion • GSAP • Three.js • Storybook • TanStack Query • TanStack Router • Jest • Supabase • PostgreSQL • Git • Vercel • Figma • OpenAPI • Swagger • WCAG 2.2 AA • Section 508
